policy: Verified positive and negative news feeds a bounded, time-decaying simulation overlay; base assumptions remain owner-controlled.

items.headline: O: Hugging Face evaluation security incident update
items.summary: O disclosed and explained a specific security incident related to model evaluation with Hugging Face, including which internal models were involved and the investigation outcome.

items.headline: O: ChatGPT release notes update (system/product changes)
items.summary: O published ChatGPT release notes for mid-July, reflecting ongoing iteration to models and product behavior (including notable changes listed in the release log).

items.headline: G: raises $650M to scale inference cloud
items.summary: G announced $650M in growth capital to accelerate expansion of its AI inference cloud; also noted key leadership appointments tied to product/tech scaling.
